title: Google Workspace
summary: Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Calendar, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Chat, Forms, Tasks, Contacts, Search, Apps Script) acting as your Google account — 121 tools via the vendored workspace-mcp engine.

secrets.label: Google OAuth client ID (workspace access)
secrets.hint: reuse the stack's shared client — Google Cloud Console → Credentials; also add https://workspace.<your-domain>/oauth2callback to its authorized redirect URIs

secrets.label: Your Google account email
secrets.hint: the single-user account the tools act as

notes: After deploy, the first workspace call walks you through Google consent in the browser (the engine's own OAuth flow); tokens persist in the tool's state volume.
Enable the Workspace APIs on the Google Cloud project (Gmail, Drive, Calendar, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Chat, Forms, Tasks, People, Apps Script).
Acts as YOUR Google account — gmail send, drive sharing, and appscript (code execution) included; consider gating writes in the manage panel.
Returns untrusted external content: the guardrail sidecar starts automatically with this tool.
Narrow the 121-tool surface anytime with WORKSPACE_MCP_TOOL_TIER=core (45) or extended (91) in its .env.
